title: Templates For Enterprise
excerpt:
Hellor Dear All 
Is it possible that you can share with me a detail with the TEMPLATES that are available for the PRO plan vs the ENTERPRISE plan. 
Many thanks.

posts.author: Lucianoi (Luciano Iglesias)

posts.cookedHtml:
Hi @Lucianoi

I can’t see a clear split list anywhere in monday.com documentation, but here is link to the templates support article, which does articulate a couple of features as Enterprise only.

Hope this is helpful!
